What is ReddyBook?

Complete guide to betting, login & registration

ReddyBook is a website for betting and gaming where players can find many different types of sports betting, casino games, and live betting exchanges. Unlike usual betting apps, this one does not use official app stores or regular user registration systems.

Actually, ReddyBook is based on a decentralised network of agents. Users are mostly introduced to the service by agents who provide them with login credentials. So, users access the service through intermediaries, unlike on regulated platforms, where they can register directly.

The terms in the ReddyBook ecosystem, like ReddyBook Club, ReddyBook App 2026, and ReddyBook Betting ID, do not stand for independent services but different aspects or versions of a single system, all developing the same business model.

Quick facts

At a glance

  • Agent-based access — no public self-signup
  • Sports, casino & live exchange markets
  • Cricket, football, tennis, basketball & esports
  • UPI, net banking, bank transfer & wallets
About Reddy Book Club →

How it works

How ReddyBook Club operates?

ReddyBook Club operates in a way that is different from other traditional betting platforms. The platform doesn't allow users to sign up directly, but rather it depends on intermediaries (agents) to a large extent.

Agent-based access

Users are not allowed to independently open accounts — reach an agent for login details

Manual transactions

Deposits and withdrawals are done through the agent manually, not via automated payment gateways

Exchange betting

Bet on cricket and football with live odds, just like betting exchanges

Casino integration

Casino-style games such as slots, poker, and card games

While this structure makes the platform simpler for many people to use, it also raises the dependence on third parties.

Live experience

Explore sports betting — live & pre-match markets

ReddyBook covers local and worldwide events with in-play odds that shift minute by minute — making every match more thrilling as you decide quickly while the game progresses.

Get started

What is the ReddyBook registration process?

Unlike the majority of online platforms, ReddyBook does not use a user self-registration system as the default option. Directly signing up via a public form is impossible for users. Account creation is mainly done through the agents or intermediaries of the platform.

1

Contact an agent via referrals, social media, or messaging apps

2

Provide basic details — name or alias, contact number (optional)

3

Receive login credentials — User ID, password, login link, or ReddyBook app 2026 access

4

Deposit funds — your agent explains how to transfer money into your account

5

Start using your account — log in via link or Reddy Book Club apk and explore markets

Start registration

Login

ReddyBook login process: enter your ID and start betting

Getting into your ReddyBook account is straightforward, but the way it operates is a bit different from other platforms. Since no public registration system is available, you can only use an agent's credentials for login.

1

Open the login page or website — enter the ReddyBook login ID URL (reddybook.com) your agent gave you, or use the Reddy Book Club APK app.

2

Type the username and password that your agent gave you. ReddyBook does not allow logging in with emails or phone numbers that are self-registered.

3

Press the "Login" button to reach your dashboard. Select "Remember Me" on personal devices for quicker future visits.

  • No sign up for everyone — only agent-provided credentials work
  • No common password reset — contact your agent if you forget your password
  • Changing links — always use the most up-to-date login URL from your agent
  • To stay safe — do not store login info on shared or public computers
Go to login

Betting ID

How to obtain a Reddy Book ID for online betting?

That ID is necessary if you want to access sports betting and casino games. Unlike normal websites, you cannot register a user account by yourself directly on the public website.

  • Get in touch with a verified ReddyBook agent via WhatsApp, Telegram, or referral
  • Check that the agent or source is reliable before any payment
  • Provide basic details such as your name and contact number
  • Pick a payment option — UPI or bank transfer
  • Agent sets up your account and gives User ID, password, and Reddybook app login link
  • Deposit into your account for betting activities
Things to keep in mind: verify the agent is trustworthy; try a small deposit first; never reveal OTPs or bank passwords; keep records of all transactions; do not be tempted by fake links or cloned websites.
Get your Reddy Book new ID

Reddy Book Club

Why should you prefer Reddy Book Club?

When users think of a good online betting portal, the top three features that come to their mind are user-friendliness, variety, and trustworthiness. Aiming at these very aspects, Reddy Book Club has managed to create a decent platform that is attracting a lot of bettors from India.

Quick sign-up

Get your ReddyBook new ID from the agent and start playing right away — Reddy Book 247 ID & 365 ID options available

Large range of betting

Cricket, football, tennis, esports — IPL, FIFA World Cup, EPL & more

Live betting

Reddy Book Live lets you bet on games in progress with real-time odds

User-friendly interface

Intuitive design — works well on lower-end smartphones too

Promotions & rewards

Reddy Book Win — cashback, referral rewards, and special bonuses

Round-the-clock support

24/7 support for login, transactions, and any questions via agents

A balanced perspective: Reddy Book Club offers conveniences, wide selections, and interactive features. However, such an online bookie is not a regulated one — users need to be very careful, always verify the sources, and go for responsible betting.

Sportsbook

Live & pre-match odds

Wide range of sports markets

The sports selection at ReddyBook may surprise you, as it includes different types of sports that allow you to check out new betting possibilities:

Cricket

IPL, international series, and domestic matches — one of the most lively sections

Football

EPL, La Liga, UEFA Champions League, and other global competitions

Tennis

Grand Slam events — bet on your favourite ATP or WTA players

Basketball

NBA and international games with several market options

Esports

Famous titles like Dota 2, CS:GO, and more

Pre-match and live betting at ReddyBook explained

  • Pre-match betting — put your money down before the game starts as you do your homework on teams, forms, and statistics
  • Live (in-play) betting — bet while the match is going on, with odds changing minute by minute with the game situation

This live betting option makes the game more thrilling, since bettors get to decide quickly as the game progresses.

Multiple betting markets

To ensure that all bettors stay attentive even when the match is in progress, ReddyBook keeps throwing various betting options:

  • Winner of the match
  • Sum of runs / goals / points
  • Best scorer or player performance
  • Over / under markets
  • Session-based bets (especially in cricket)

Cricket ID

What is a ReddyBook Cricket ID and how does it work?

A ReddyBook Cricket ID is a pass for users to avail themselves of special cricket betting markets, including some of the world's most famous cricket tournaments. Since cricket is one of the feature-rich sections on the website, this specific ID is of great significance for cricket lovers.

Tournaments

IPL, ICC T20 World Cup, ODI World Cup, international tours & local matches

Live features

Live betting, session markets, and player-oriented betting options

How to get it

Contact a trusted agent via WhatsApp, Telegram, or referral — the only method of getting access

The agent will set up your account and provide User ID, password, and login link or Reddy Book Club app access. This ID can also serve as your cricket ReddyBook betting ID.

Get cricket ID

Promotions

How do ReddyBook bonuses and promotions work?

ReddyBook has a range of bonuses and promotional deals aimed at making the betting experience of new and existing users more enjoyable. These incentives help users get the most out of their games.

400%Welcome bonus

Up to ₹25,000 on first deposit — extra funds instantly for new members

5%Deposit bonus

5% bonus for every deposit — increase your balance without limitations

2%Weekly cashback

2% weekly cashback on losses to help mitigate tough weeks

∞Refer-a-friend

Earn bonuses when invited friends register and place bets

The platform regularly unveils new seasonal deals. Rely on your agent or platform updates for accurate and timely information on limited-time offers.

Payments & deposits

Payment methods available on ReddyBook

Transactions are mostly done through agents — steps may vary but remain quick and useful.

UPIFast & regular — instant transfers from your bank account
Net bankingInternet banking from majority of Indian banks
Bank transferDirect deposits per agent instructions
Digital walletsPaytm and similar wallet-based payments

How to add / deposit funds

1

Log in with username and password from your agent

2

Navigate to Deposit on the dashboard, or ask your agent for payment instructions

3

Pick UPI, net banking, bank transfer, or digital wallets

4

Decide deposit amount — minimum ~₹100 (agent discretion)

5

Pay using UPI ID or bank details from your agent

6

After confirmation, funds credit instantly or after short verification

Withdrawals

Process of withdrawing from ReddyBook

1

Log in with your Reddy book login information

2

Go to withdrawal section or contact your agent

3

Choose UPI, bank transfer, or net banking

4

Enter amount — minimum ~₹500 (may vary)

5

Submit request with UPI ID or bank details if required

6

Receive funds within a few hours to one day after approval

Payment help →

Conclusion

Your ticket to a feature-rich betting session

A Reddy Book Club ID is really your ticket to a very user-friendly and feature-rich betting session. It allows you to tap into an extensive selection of sports and casino games, all in one place. Whether it's cricket or football you want to bet on, or if you prefer live games and real-time betting, you will find the platform perfectly crafted to entertain users through a wide range of choices and a neat interface.

What makes it attractive even for seasoned users is its instant access, different markets, and simplicity. But as it is run by agents without a fully regulated system, there is a need to be very careful, ensure the origin of the sources, and handle your activities wisely. With the right amount of precaution, a Reddy Book Club ID could be your way to a quick and fun online betting experience without losing sight of the potential risks.

Ready?

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

What is ReddyBook?

ReddyBook is a web-based platform providing sports betting, casino games, and live market betting services through an agent-network system.

How do I get a ReddyBook ID?

You get your ReddyBook ID by first finding a verified agent whom you can contact via WhatsApp, Telegram, or a referral. The agent will then help you register your account and provide you with your login information.

Can I register on ReddyBook directly?

Unfortunately, there is no way to sign up for ReddyBook really on your own, as ReddyBook accounts are only made through agents.

How do I log in to ReddyBook?

Once you have received your username and password from the agent, just click on the official login page or use the app to get to the login screen.

What payment methods are used on ReddyBook?

In most cases, payment methods include UPI, bank transfers, net banking, and digital wallets like Paytm (depending on the agent).

Is ReddyBook safe to use?

Since ReddyBook is based on an unregulated agent model, it is recommended that users exercise caution and thoroughly check the credibility of any agent before doing business with them.

What sports can I bet on in ReddyBook?

The choice of sports in ReddyBook includes cricket, football, tennis, basketball, esports, and even live betting markets.

Ready to get started?

Register for your Reddy Book Club cricket ID or log in to access sports, casino, and live betting.
